name: Grilled Red Onions
recipeIngredient: 2 tablespoons balsamic vinegar, or red wine vinegar
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut 1/4-inch off the top and bottom of each onion and discard.
2. Cut the remaining lengthwise to create halves.
3. Place the onion halves in a shallow dish.
4. Whisk together Worcestershire sauce, balsamic vinegar (or red wine vinegar), soy sauce, and pepper.
5. Pour the mixture over the onions, ensuring they are evenly coated.
6. Allow the onions to marinate for one to two hours, turning them halfway through the time.
7. Preheat grill or broiler to high heat.
8. Place the onions on the grill, arranging them in a single layer.
9. Cook for approximately 10 minutes, turning once after five minutes.
10. Ensure the onions reach your desired level of doneness before serving.
Nutritional information per serving: 48 calories (32% from fat), protein 1.1 g, fat 1.8 g (poly 0.2 g, mono 1.3 g, sat 0.3 g), carb 7.6 g, fiber 1.4 g, chol 0 mg, iron 0.5 mg, sodium 251 mg, calcium 21 mg.
